_publications._publicationTitle: Dose-dependent effects of focal fractionated irradiation on secondary malignant neoplasms in Nf1 mutant mice.

_contextSnippet: We obtained complete blood counts (CBCs) from 96 of 121 (80%) mice in the study cohort at death from disease or elective euthanasia
details: Successfully obtained complete blood counts from 96 of 121 (80%) mice in the study cohort
